script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== verify azureuser cron is in place ==='
crontab -u azureuser -l 2>&1 | grep -F '.claude-cred-chmod.sh' || echo 'WARNING: not found in azureuser crontab'
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude-cred-chmod.sh 2>&1
echo '=== disable + remove my redundant systemd timer ==='
systemctl disable --now claude-creds-maint.timer 2>&1
rm -f /etc/systemd/system/claude-creds-maint.timer /etc/systemd/system/claude-creds-maint.service
rm -f /etc/systemd/system/timers.target.wants/claude-creds-maint.timer
rm -f /usr/local/sbin/maintain-claude-creds.sh
systemctl daemon-reload
echo '=== verify timer is gone ==='
systemctl list-timers --all 2>&1 | grep -F 'claude-creds-maint' || echo 'OK: timer removed'
echo '=== final cred state ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '===END==='
